result.stdout:
Enigmatry.Entry.CodeGeneration.Tools:
  Generates UI client feature component(s) from configuration(s)

Usage:
  Enigmatry.Entry.CodeGeneration.Tools [options]

Options:
  -sa, --source-assembly <source-assembly> (REQUIRED)                Source assembly file from which component(s) configuration(s) will be read
  -dd, --destination-directory <destination-directory> (REQUIRED)    Destination directory where angular component(s) will be generated
  -c, --component <component>                                        Single component to be generated
  -f, --feature <feature>                                            Single feature to be generated
  -vlp, --validators-path <validators-path>                          Destination of custom-validators.ts file
  -i, --enable-i18n                                                  Enable i18n
  -stc, --standalone-components                                      With support for standalone components
  -s, --signals                                                      With support for signals
  --version                                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Enigmatry.Entry.CodeGeneration.Tools:
  Generates UI client feature component(s) from configuration(s)

Usage:
  Enigmatry.Entry.CodeGeneration.Tools [options]

Options:
  -sa, --source-assembly <source-assembly> (REQUIRED)                Source assembly file from which component(s) configuration(s) will be read
  -dd, --destination-directory <destination-directory> (REQUIRED)    Destination directory where angular component(s) will be generated
  -c, --component <component>                                        Single component to be generated
  -f, --feature <feature>                                            Single feature to be generated
  -vlp, --validators-path <validators-path>                          Destination of custom-validators.ts file
  -i, --enable-i18n                                                  Enable i18n
  -stc, --standalone-components                                      With support for standalone components
  -s, --signals                                                      With support for signals
  --version                                                          Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                     Show help and usage information
